title: Interagency Guidance on Third-Party Relationships: Risk Management
abstract: The Board, FDIC, and OCC (collectively, the agencies) are issuing final guidance on managing risks associated with third-party relationships. The final guidance offers the agencies' views on sound risk management principles for banking organizations when developing and implementing risk management practices for all stages in the life cycle of third-party relationships. The final guidance states that sound third-party risk management takes into account the level of risk, complexity, and size of t
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
